overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a flooded post-apocalyptic waterfront during a heavy storm. The character moves from a concrete structure into shallow water filled with ruined pillars, heading toward a distant Ferris wheel under dark, turbulent clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded coastal edge near concrete structure

events.description: character steps from concrete edge into shallow flood water, splashing increases
walking pace remains steady as water depth increases around legs

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously from the concrete structure into the flooded ruins, water splashing with each step

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete wall with vegetation growing on the surface
rusted vehicle wreck partially visible near the building wall
scattered broken pillars and ruins rising from the flood water
large Ferris wheel structure visible in the distance through the storm
choppy water surface with whitecaps and splashes from the heavy rain

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character walking alongside a concrete building wall in a heavy storm, entering a flooded coastal area. The character moves from the sheltered edge into shallow water filled with broken concrete pillars, while a distant Ferris wheel remains visible through the hazy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded ruins with scattered concrete pillars

events.description: character raises right hand to shield face from heavy rain and wind
waves and water splashing intensify as character moves deeper into the flooded area

agents.ego_description: continuing through the flooded ruins toward the distant Ferris wheel, raising hand to shield face from the storm

entered.detail: twisted metal wreckage and collapsed framework visible on the right side

segments.scene_description: Fully exposed in the open flooded area, the character continues walking through waist-deep water among scattered concrete pillars. The building is now behind, and the Ferris wheel shifts across the frame as the character advances. At 15 seconds, the character raises a hand to shield against the driving rain while pressing forward through the choppy water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from the shelter of a concrete structure into the heart of a storm-lashed, flooded wasteland. It begins with the character walking alongside a building wall before stepping out into shallow coastal waters filled with broken concrete pillars. As the character moves further from the building, the scene opens into a wide, exposed expanse of waist-deep water where a distant Ferris wheel shifts across the frame through the hazy rain. The camera continues to press forward through the choppy water, finally capturing the character raising a hand to shield their face against the driving storm.
